name: Cherry Crescent Cheesecake Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease 8 muffin cups.
3. In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese and egg until smooth.
4. Add powdered sugar, chopped almonds, and almond extract; mix well.
5. Separate the dough into four rectangles.
6. Firmly press the perforations to seal each rectangle.
7. Press or roll each rectangle into an 8x4-inch rectangle.
8. Cut each rectangle in half crosswise to form 8 squares.
9. Place each square on the bottom of a prepared muffin cup, leaving the corners extended over the sides of the cup.
10. Spoon about 1/4 cup cream cheese mixture into the center of each square.
11. Fold the four corners together in the center of the cup and press firmly to seal.
12. Bake at 350°F for 18 to 23 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Remove from muffin cups immediately.
14. In a small saucepan, combine topping ingredients; cook over low heat until bubbly and margarine melts.
15. Serve over warm desserts. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 8 servings.
